CryptOfFortunePayoutAndRulesShared.Rule1_15_Payout6_4: After the payout of every round is made, all winning symbols will explode allowing the symbols above them to cascade down for a new round.
CryptOfFortunePayoutAndRulesShared.Rule1_16_Payout6_5: Additional winning combination will be tallied in every round until no more winning combination can be tallied.
CryptOfFortunePayoutAndRulesShared.Rule1_18_Payout1_1: Wild symbol substitutes for all symbols except Scatter symbol.
CryptOfFortunePayoutAndRulesShared.Rule1_19_Payout1_2: Wild symbols appears on reels 2, 3, 4 and 5 only.
CryptOfFortunePayoutAndRulesShared.Rule2_1_Payout2_1: The number indicated on the Wild symbol represents the number of the times the Wild symbol can be used in a winning combination before it destroys itself.
CryptOfFortunePayoutAndRulesShared.Rule2_2_Payout2_2: Any Wild symbol that appears on the reels will start with the value of 3.
CryptOfFortunePayoutAndRulesShared.Rule2_3_Payout2_3: Each Wild symbol that appears on the reel will increase the win multiplier by 1.
CryptOfFortunePayoutAndRulesShared.Rule2_4_Payout2_4: If a Wild symbol is involved in a win and the number at the top portion of the Wild symbol indicates a value of 2 or more, the Wild symbol will not destroy itself in the next round and that value is deducted by 1.
CryptOfFortunePayoutAndRulesShared.Rule2_5_Payout2_5: If a Wild symbol is involved in a win and the number at the top portion of the Wild symbol indicates a value of 1, the Wild symbol will destroy itself in the next round.
CryptOfFortunePayoutAndRulesShared.Rule3_1_Payout3_1: 3 Scatter symbols appearing anywhere will trigger the Free Spins Feature with 10 free spins. Each additional Scatter symbol will trigger 2 more free spins.
CryptOfFortunePayoutAndRulesShared.Rule3_2_Payout3_2: During the Free Spins Feature, any unused Wild symbol on the reels will stay on the reels until the end of the Free Spins Feature or until it is involved in any win.

CryptOfFortuneRule.Rule1_1: Raider Jane's Crypt of Fortune is a 6-reel, 3-row (with an additional row for each of reel 2, 3, 4 and 5) video slot featuring sticky Wild Symbols and win multiplier.
CryptOfFortuneRule.Rule1_2: The game is played with 20 base bet for %{2304} ways (fixed), bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of %{minChip} to %{maxChip}.
CryptOfFortuneRule.Rule1_21: Free Spins Feature is played at the same bet size and bet level as the spin that triggered the Free Spins Feature.
